# StadiumIQ

> GenAI-enabled Smart Stadium & Tournament Operations assistant for the FIFA World Cup 2026.

StadiumIQ delivers role-based views for fans, volunteers, organizers, and venue staff — with AI-generated wayfinding, crowd management, multilingual chat, and real-time decision support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Role selector and overview
- [Fan view](/fan): Wayfinding, transport, accessibility, multilingual AI chat
- [Volunteer view](/volunteer): Assistance queue, guest support
- [Organizer view](/organizer): Crowd dashboard, decision support, ops intelligence
- [Staff view](/staff): Venue map, ops intelligence, decision support
